semantic.role: Define structural patterns for code analysis in the ArchSpine mirror system
responsibilities: Defining pattern syntax for exports (classes, interfaces)
Defining pattern syntax for usages (method calls, object instantiation)
Establishing a configuration grammar for ArchSpine's reflection engine
outOfScope: Implementation details of the pattern matching engine

English.purpose: This document specifies the pattern definitions used by the ArchSpine mirror system to identify structural code elements such as imports, exports (classes/interfaces), and usages (calls/instantiations). It serves as a configuration reference for developers integrating code analysis or architecture validation.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for developers and architects working on the ArchSpine tool, who need to understand or extend the pattern matching capabilities. It assumes familiarity with the system's reflection and mirroring concepts.
key_takeaways: The document defines a grammar for three categories: imports, exports, usages.
Exports include patterns for class and interface declarations, both public and default visibility.
Usages cover method calls and constructor invocations.
Each pattern consists of an id and a pattern string with placeholders.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档定义了ArchSpine镜像系统中用于识别结构代码元素的模式，包括导入、导出（类/接口）和使用（调用/实例化）。作为开发者在集成代码分析或架构验证时的配置参考。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 适用于使用ArchSpine工具的开发者与架构师，需理解或扩展模式匹配功能。假定读者熟悉系统的反射与镜像概念。
key_takeaways: 文档定义了三种类别的模式语法：导入、导出、使用。
导出包括类和接口声明的模式，涵盖公有和默认可见性。
使用包括方法调用和构造函数调用。
每个模式由id和带占位符的pattern字符串组成。
